title: Infinity Vault
description: Loot Ominous Vaults unlimited times — no more one-per-player restriction!
body:
🚀 Update available — Infinity Vault v2.0
🔓 Normal Vaults AND Ominous Vaults now reset infinitely!
♾️ No more limits — loot them as many times as you want!
⬇️ Update now!

📖 Description

Infinity Vault is a lightweight datapack for Minecraft Java Edition (1.21+) that removes the one-time restriction on Ominous Vaults found in Trial Chambers.

By default, each player can only open an Ominous Vault once per world. With this datapack installed, the vault resets continuously — meaning you can loot it as many times as you want, with any number of players, without needing to find new Trial Chambers.

Perfect for survival servers, adventure maps, or anyone who wants to farm Trial Chamber loot without traveling endlessly.

✨ Features

- 🔓 Unlimited Ominous Vault opening — no more one-per-player restriction
- ♾️ Works for all players on the server — not limited to the host
- ⚡ Lightweight & optimized — uses a 2-second scan timer to minimize server load
- 🧩 No mods required — 100% pure datapack, no resource pack needed
- 🗺️ Multiplayer & singleplayer compatible
- 📦 Works with existing worlds — just drop it in and reload


📋 Compatibility

| Minecraft Version | Pack Format | Status     |
|-------------------|-------------|------------|
| 1.21              | 48          | ✅ Supported |
| 1.21.1            | 48          | ✅ Supported |
| 1.21.2            | 57          | ✅ Supported |
| 1.21.3            | 57          | ✅ Supported |
| 1.21.4            | 61          | ✅ Supported |
| 1.21.5            | 71          | ✅ Supported |
| 1.21.6            | 75          | ✅ Supported |
| 1.21.7            | 78          | ✅ Supported |
| 1.21.8            | 83          | ✅ Supported |
| 1.21.9+           | 88+         | ✅ Supported |

> Version files:Each Minecraft version has its own dedicated datapack file in the release. Pick the one matching your version, or use the **universal version** which supports all versions from 1.21 upward.



🚀 Installation

1. Download the `.zip` file matching your Minecraft version (or the universal version)
2. Place the `.zip` file inside your world's `datapacks` folder:
   - **Singleplayer:** `.minecraft/saves/<YourWorld>/datapacks/`
   - **Server:** `<server_folder>/world/datapacks/`
3. Launch or reload your world
4. Run `/reload` if your world is already open
5. You should see the confirmation message in chat: **[Infinity Vault] Datapack loaded!**

❓ FAQ

Does this also reset normal Vaults?
No. This datapack only targets Ominous Vaults (`ominous=true`). Normal Trial Vaults are unaffected.

Does it work on Realms?
Yes! As long as you can upload datapacks to your Realm (requires Realm ownership), it will work.

Does it conflict with other datapacks?
It should be compatible with most datapacks. If you use another vault-modifying datapack, load order may matter.

Is this allowed on servers?
Yes! This datapack is free to use for any purpose, including on public servers, modpacks, and content creation.


📜 License

**Free to use by anyone.** No restrictions. You are free to:
- Use it in singleplayer or on any server
- Include it in modpacks
- Feature it in videos, streams, or content
- Modify it for personal use

No credit required, but always appreciated! 🙂

Created by Kav94. Enjoy unlimited vaults.

*This datapack is not affiliated with or endorsed by Mojang Studios.
